jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zappfresh - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh:
Zappfresh is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh!
